positive: A highly detailed, stylized minimalist drawing of a celestial river nebula flowing through a stylized crescent moon and surrounding several geometric planets. The composition features a central vertical element (the river) contrasted against the clean white negative space. The style should be a mix of neo-art nouveau line work and crisp linocut engraving, utilizing deep indigo, ethereal cyan, and muted golds. Strong contrast is key, with the subjects appearing as clean silhouettes and highly defined shapes suitable for apparel printing. Cinematic lighting, symmetrical composition, flat vector look, suitable for screen printing, isolated on white background.
